description: Analyze the surgical case file 'case0006.vital' in Vital Recorder to identify the 5-minute window with the greatest mean arterial pressure (MAP) variability in the ART_MBP track. Document this window by capturing a screenshot of the zoomed view to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\bp_variability_capture.png'. Create a text report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\bp_variability_report.txt' containing the approximate start and end times (in minutes from record start), the MAP range (min/max) during that window, and a brief clinical interpretation.
